fieldguide.block.ribbits.umbrella_leaf.d: Umbrella Leaves are large leaf blocks that provide Ribbits with respite from the rain that so often plagues their home environments. Take these away, and the frogs get cranky!
fieldguide.block.ribbits.giant_lilypad.d: It's a big Lily Pad. Groundbreaking, I know. Wait shouldn't it be like, water-tension breaking? Someone else write a better joke.
fieldguide.block.ribbits.toadstool.descr: Small red mushrooms that grow near the whimsical magic of Ribbit society. They do not grow or spread, seeming to take form out of pure magical essence.
fieldguide.block.ribbits.swamp_daisy.des: Decorative flowers that grow near the whimsical magic of Ribbit society. Their white petals are said to symbolise the Ribbits' pureness of heart.
fieldguide.entity.ribbits.ribbit.descrip: Ribbits are magical frog people born of whimsy, joy and unrelenting commerce. They harbor diverse professions, abilities and quirks, and each one makes them more charming and adorable. A day spent with Ribbits is always a day well spent.
